description: Expand the Digital Dreamscape world with new domains, lore, and interactive elements

tasks.title: Discover and document new world domains
tasks.description: Identify emerging domains in the system that need formal recognition

tasks.title: Develop canonical lore for discovered domains
tasks.description: Create foundational narratives and rules for each new domain

tasks.title: Design domain interaction mechanisms
tasks.description: Create systems for agents and users to interact with each domain

tasks.title: Integrate domain artifacts into world systems
tasks.description: Connect domain-specific artifacts with broader world mechanics
